settings.hero_eyebrow: The Standard We Hold Ourselves To
settings.hero_subtitle: The materials we choose. The people who make them. The process that turns raw goods into something your pet wears every day of their life.

settings.title: Full-Grain Leather
settings.description: The highest grade of leather — the outermost layer of the hide with the natural grain intact. More expensive, harder to work with, and less uniform than corrected-grain alternatives. The only leather that genuinely improves with age, developing a rich patina unique to each animal.
settings.used_in: Used in: Leather Collars, Leads, Harness Sets

settings.title: Braided Rope & Cotton
settings.description: Guimarães has been a centre of textile manufacturing since the 12th century. Our rope leads and woven components are made by a family-run mill operating there for four generations. OEKO-TEX certified, machine-washable, colourfast — soft enough for the most sensitive skin.
settings.used_in: Used in: Rope Leads, Braided Collars, Harness Webbing

settings.title: Hand-Thrown Ceramics
settings.description: Our ceramic bowls are made in small batches by an independent ceramicist in northern NSW. Each piece is thrown on the wheel, bisque-fired, hand-glazed and kiln-fired — no two are identical. Food-safe, lead-free glaze. Each colourway is capped at 200 units.
settings.used_in: Used in: Ceramic Bowl Range, Double Bowl Stands

settings.title: Technical Fabrics
settings.description: Our harnesses, raincoats and reflective components use technical fabrics from a specialist mill in southern Germany. Tested for abrasion resistance, UV stability, moisture management and reflectivity. No compromises where safety intersects with function.
settings.used_in: Used in: Mesh Harnesses, Reflective Leads, Raincoats

settings.title: Material First
settings.description: We source the material before we design the product. We visit suppliers, handle samples across multiple seasons and wear conditions, and decide on material quality before a single sketch is drawn.
settings.image_hint: Material swatches — leather, rope, fabric samples arranged on surface

settings.title: Design Around the Material
settings.description: The design is built around what the material can do well — its drape, hand-feel, strength, limitations. We don't force materials into shapes they're wrong for.

settings.title: Prototype & Test
settings.description: Every product goes through a minimum of four prototype rounds before production. Each prototype is tested on real animals in real conditions.
settings.image_hint: Dog being fitted with prototype harness

settings.title: Small-Run Production
settings.description: We produce in deliberate small runs — 150–400 units per colourway. Small runs mean quality control at every stage and no excess inventory that forces discounting.
settings.image_hint: Finished products lined up — overhead studio shot
Leather being cut and hand-stitched — artisan hands, warm workshop light
settings.caption: Cutting & Edge Finishing · Veneto

settings.image_hint: Solid brass hardware — rings and buckles arranged on leather surface
settings.caption: Solid Brass Hardware

settings.image_hint: Final quality check — hands holding finished collar
settings.caption: Final Quality Check

settings.title: No Split Leather, Ever
settings.description: We only use full-grain or top-grain leather. Split leather — the lower layer used in budget accessories — looks similar initially but degrades quickly and flakes with wear.

settings.title: Solid Metal Hardware Only
settings.description: Every buckle, ring and clip is cast from solid brass or stainless steel — not plated zinc alloy, which corrodes with moisture and fails under sustained load.

settings.title: OEKO-TEX Certified Textiles
settings.description: Every woven, knitted or fabric component is OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified — tested and confirmed free from harmful substances including heavy metals, formaldehyde and pesticide residues.

settings.title: Food-Safe Ceramics, Always
settings.description: All ceramic bowls use food-safe, lead-free glaze — kiln-fired at temperatures that permanently bond the glaze. We test every new colourway before release.

settings.title: Breakaway Safety on All Cat Collars
settings.description: Every cat collar uses a safety breakaway buckle that releases under sustained pressure. We will never sell a non-breakaway cat collar. This is a safety commitment, not a feature.

settings.title: Plastic-Free Packaging
settings.description: All products are packaged in recycled card, tissue and cotton ribbon. No plastic mailers, no bubble wrap. We offset carbon on every international shipment.
